creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks, Tobias.  I agree, this is where such a check would go, but I have a hard time reconciling this with the PH where it states that DISTVERSION might not be sufficient given the syntax of the DISTVERSION.  So would this not just cause more confusion for new porters?  Is there a reliable regex that would indicate that a PORTVERSION is being used where DISTVERSION would be better?
